verdict.answer_first: A: "The simplest way is a small `useDebounce` hook"; B also leads clearly: "The simplest approach is a custom hook"
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to one path and only says library "only if you already have the dependency"; B spreads into "150–250ms", "500ms", "AbortController", Mantine/use-debounce, React Query/SWR
verdict.fabrication: B has unsupported preference: "300ms is a good default"; A none
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on: hook + usage + one rule, "debounce the value, not the event handler"
